title: pelargonium angustum
intro: Pelargonium angustum, also known as the 'narrow-leaved rose', is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium angustum include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
